**What this changes and why**

**Checklist**
- [ ] One feature or fix per PR
- [ ] Stays within the zero-build philosophy (plain Node / plain HTML+CSS+JS) — see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Tested the realtime path with two browser tabs (they count as two devices)
- [ ] If the server changed: tested a wrong access code (rejected), a right one (syncs), and a paste round-trip
